useContributeApp.description: Use new contribute application for creating and editing events

useAgendaSchema.description: Use agenda schema app to customize fields

premiumCustomFields.description: Allow adding multiple custom fields to agenda form

embedsHead.description: Integrated agendas: The content of the <head> tag can be edited

embedsTemplates.description: Integrated agendas: Custom templates can be defined

activatingInvitations.description: When the user with no account is invited to the agenda, no activation mail is required to complete signup

aggregator.description: Agenda aggregation. Do not forget to initialize the tab on the agenda admin menu

invitationMessage.description: Members invitation message can be customized

prioritizedAggregator.description: Prioritized queue for important aggregation networks

eventOwnershipTransfer.description: Transfer ownership of event from one member to another within an agenda

graphs.description: Display graph tab on agenda admin

useJSONBridge.description: JSON export V1 is generated from the V2 format
